services.title: Our Comprehensive Sourcing Services
services.subtitle: We offer end-to-end sourcing solutions tailored to your business needs

services.title: Supplier Verification
services.desc: We thoroughly vet and verify suppliers to ensure they meet international quality standards and business ethics.

services.title: Product Sourcing
services.desc: Find the right products at competitive prices with our extensive network of reliable manufacturers and suppliers.

services.title: Quality Control
services.desc: Comprehensive quality inspection at every stage of production to ensure products meet your specifications.

services.title: Logistics & Shipping
services.desc: Hassle-free shipping solutions including sea, air and express delivery with competitive rates.

services.title: Price Negotiation
services.desc: Leverage our local expertise to negotiate the best prices and payment terms with suppliers.

services.title: Risk Management
services.desc: Mitigate risks associated with international trade including payment security and delivery guarantees.

blocks.heading: Extensive Product Range
blocks.text: With access to thousands of suppliers across China, we help you find the perfect products for your business. From consumer electronics to home goods, we cover a wide range of categories.

blocks.heading: Strict Quality Control
blocks.text: Every product goes through our rigorous quality control process. We inspect at every stage - from raw materials to final packaging - ensuring you receive only the highest quality products.

process.title: Our Simple Sourcing Process
process.subtitle: We make sourcing from China straightforward and transparent

steps.title: Your Requirements
steps.desc: Share your product specifications, quantity, budget and timeline with our team.

steps.title: Supplier Matching
steps.desc: We identify and verify the best suppliers that match your specific requirements.

steps.title: Sample & Pricing
steps.desc: Obtain samples and competitive pricing quotes from pre-vetted suppliers.

steps.title: Delivery & Support
steps.desc: We handle production oversight, quality control and shipping to your doorstep.

blocks.text: Our quality control team works tirelessly to ensure every product meets your exact specifications. From initial sample verification to final pre-shipment inspections, we've got you covered at every step of the way.

plans.title: Our Service Plans
plans.subtitle: Choose the sourcing plan that fits your business needs

testimonials.text: Yeatru Sourcing helped me source 5000+ storage boxes from Yiwu, great quality and fast shipping. Highly recommended!
testimonials.author: Marco

testimonials.text: Professional team, strict quality control, and excellent after-sales service. Best China sourcing partner I ever worked with.
testimonials.author: Anna

testimonials.text: The price negotiation service saved me over 20% on my order. The logistics team ensured on-time delivery to the US. Very satisfied!
testimonials.author: John

about.title: About Yeatru Sourcing
about.profileDesc: Yeatru Sourcing is a professional one-stop sourcing agent located in Yiwu City, the world's largest small commodity distribution center. We specialize in providing global clients with reliable procurement services, supplier development, strict quality inspection, supplier management and integrated logistics solutions.

contact.title: Get In Touch With Us
contact.subtitle: Ready to start your sourcing journey? Fill out the form or contact us directly using the information below.
